headline: Sterling Stock  Surges 109.3% in a Month: Too Late to Buy?
summary: Can STRL keep climbing after a 109.3% monthly surge to new highs on blowout Q1 results, or has valuation and Wall Street's $506.50 target made it too late?

headline: Quanta Services (PWR) Reports Record Q1 2026 Revenue of $7.87B
summary: Quanta Services Inc. (NYSE:PWR) is one of the best growth stocks to invest in for the next 2 years. On April 30, Quanta Services delivered an exceptional performance for Q1 2026, setting multiple records across its financial metrics. Consolidated revenues reached a record $7.87 billion, a significant increase from $6.23 billion in the prior-year period. […]
